name: Peanut Muffins W/Hidden Jelly Surprise
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fruit Jam or Jelly of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Beat the egg in a bowl.
3. Stir in the milk and melted butter into the egg mixture.
4. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
5. Mix the egg mixture with the sifted dry ingredients until just combined.
6. Add half the chopped peanuts to the batter.
7. Pour the batter into a well-greased muffin tin, filling each cavity about halfway full.
8. Drop 1 teaspoon of jam or jelly into the center of each muffin.
9. Add more batter to each muffin, filling them almost to the top.
10. Sprinkle the remaining chopped peanuts over the top of each muffin.
11. Bake for about 20 minutes, until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Serve warm or at room temperature.
